## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO content strategy, conversion optimization, and distribution channels for Arena.im](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating high-quality, engaging content around community and engagement topics](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Utilize data to identify high-performing content and double down on those topics/angles](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore conversion optimization tactics like CTAs, case studies, calculators, exit intent popups](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Leverage organic channels like LinkedIn for content distribution and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy

  - [Publishing 10 new articles per week, aiming for 40-60 per month](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Updating content with year (e.g. 2024 to 2025) to signal freshness](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Identifying low search volume "blue ocean" keywords to target](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Analyzing top-ranking competitors and incorporating missing elements](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Adding clear CTAs relevant to each article's topic](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Utilizing whitespace for engagement tools like chatbots, calculators](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Offering gated content like case studies as lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Implementing exit intent popups to capture engaged visitors](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Distribution Channels

  - [Organic search is primary, tracking impressions/CTR to optimize](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Leveraging LinkedIn for content promotion and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Using tools like Expandi.io to build warm audiences on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Sharing customer stories, insights, and behind-the-scenes updates](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue publishing 10+ articles per week, analyzing performance](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Explore conversion optimization tactics like CTAs, case studies, calculators](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Implement LinkedIn content strategy to build warm audiences](https://fathom.video/share/4bDbzxytVKnJtxtPrXpTzjDay8QmQVyv?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - Investigate intent data tools like Clearbit to enable targeted outreach
